>
> On Mon, Nov 1, 2021 at 3:00 AM FlexSol Lighting Solutions <
> sales@flexsolsolutions.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi Antonio,
>>
>> Thank you for reaching out to us. Great to hear that you are interested
>> in Soluxio, Soluxio solar lighting, Soluxio Connect product line, Solar
>> Roof Tile, Soluxio Kit, Soluxio OEM, Soluxio solar product range! The
>> Soluxio will exceed all your solar power expectations. With superior
>> quality, magnificent design and highly developed features we’ve created the most
>> exclusive solar products
>> <https://t.sidekickopen07.com/s3t/c/5/f18dQhb0S7kv8cpgfjW1glLnS59hl3kW7_k2842QxTLbW7v55XP7v4WHnW1FVK202bzNNmf7DB7NN01?te=W3R5hFj4cm2zwW3M4SwY4cNc5kW43SPsn3T1MdZf1JxwY5V3&si=5704766876418048&pi=fe8f65a6a67a1414073cc8cea1787b75>
>> available in the world. Our highly skilled in-house engineering and design
>> departments make sure we continue to stay light-years ahead in solar
>> technology.
>>
>> *Benefits & exclusive features:*
>>
>>    - Longest autonomy on the market. By using high-quality lithium
>>    batteries our autonomy will last up to 30 days
>>    - Up-and-running within 45 minutes, watch our installation video:
>>    https://youtu.be/6r-v8FdVkhQ
>>    - No configuration needed due to our plug-and-play design
>>    - Connected to the internet for remote assistance, monitoring and
>>    asset management
>>    - Remote assistance during installation by our engineering department
>>    - High-quality components resulting in a longer lifespan
>>    - Dirt, dust and snow intolerant due to borosilicate glass tubes
>>    - Automatic on/off switch as a result of built-in GPS and
>>    astronomical clock
>>    - The latest technology lithium battery pack fully integrated in
>>    column at maintenance-friendly height
>>    - Made in the Netherlands, Europe
>>
>> To guarantee trusted quality, we partner with world-leading companies,
>> such as Valmont Structures, Nedal (Purso Group Oy), Schott AG, Siteco,
>> Innolumis and Aruba Networking.
>>
>> We take pride in impressing our clients with our products and we feel
>> grateful to continuously receive outstanding feedback. For pictures of our
>> prior installations, such as in Finland, the USA, Qatar, Oman, Germany and
>> other places, please visit our website
>> <https://t.sidekickopen07.com/s3t/c/5/f18dQhb0S7kv8cpgfjW1glLnS59hl3kW7_k2842QxTLbW7v55XP7v4WHnW1FVK202bzNNmf7DB7NN01?te=W3R5hFj4cm2zwW4cNc5m4pBs0qW3ZWVhl4fJfX_1V3&si=5704766876418048&pi=fe8f65a6a67a1414073cc8cea1787b75>
>> or follow our social media pages ( Pinterest
>> <https://t.sidekickopen07.com/s3t/c/5/f18dQhb0S7kv8cpgfjW1glLnS59hl3kW7_k2842QxTLbW7v55XP7v4WHnW1FVK202bzNNmf7DB7NN01?te=W3R5hFj4cm2zwW4mKLS-45Q3XvW3K8PTr4fdHZSW3_rh9l3KcjYwF3Z_2LFmMlS1&si=5704766876418048&pi=fe8f65a6a67a1414073cc8cea1787b75>,
